pages.raw_text:
The sad news of the untimely death
of F. Stacy Whitney. who died at
Tacoma yesterday from typhoid pncu-
monia. has been learned with deep
regret by the members of the local
unions.


Mr.. Whitney was one Of the general
organizers for the Pacific states. He
was appointed to that position last
June by the American Federation or
Labor, and. though his efforts in the
cause of labor were Of brief duration,
his work net with unbounded sue
cess and stands as an undying monu-
ment to his ability and industry.


He was chairman of the reception
committee when Samuel Gompers and
party were here last August. After
that he remained in the city for one
month, when he was suddenly called
away to organize on the sound. Will
visiting Tacoma he took i'll there witt
e typhoid pneumonia, from which his
death has resulted.
